acts.challenge: The config wizard was broken in four interdependent ways: it opened on the wrong tab, guided mode was accepted but never activated, text was invisible in light mode due to hardcoded colors, and theme switches didn't refresh the config panel.
acts.build: Surgical fixes across three files (telec.py, app.py, config.py). The key decision was replacing the hardcoded color constant with a dynamic function that reads the theme at render time, and wiring the guided mode parameter through the full CLI-to-TUI stack.
acts.gauntlet: One review round. The original builder used a no-demo marker claiming 'requires live terminal interaction' — which exposed a gap in the demo enforcement system. The escape hatch rules were tightened as a result.
acts.whats_next: The config wizard guided mode is now functional and ready for content expansion. Each config section can now have its own guided walkthrough steps.
